summary: Both REQ-24 and REQ-25 appear to be implemented in the diff. Footer.tsx has been updated with the caffeine.ai attribution line reading 'Built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team', and Vehicles.tsx now references six distinct 360-degree images from /assets/generated/. However, no image files were added to frontend/public/assets/generated/, which is a critical gap for REQ-25.

missing_requirements.requirement: Photorealistic 360-degree vehicle images must be stored in frontend/public/assets/generated (6 image files: innova-crysta-360.dim_800x500.png, fortuner-360.dim_800x500.png, ertiga-360.dim_800x500.png, tempo-traveller-360.dim_800x500.png, force-traveller-360.dim_800x500.png, luxury-coach-360.dim_800x500.png)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 0 added files and no image assets were added under frontend/public/assets/generated/. While Vehicles.tsx references these image paths, the actual image files are not present in the diff.
